description: Fetch the hot story ranking from Lobsters (lobste.rs), a high-quality engineer community. Supports four sort modes: hot (votes + recency), new (latest submissions), active (recent comments), and top (highest votes in time window). Returns up to 25 ranked stories with title, URL, votes, domain, tags, author, comment count, and publish time. No authentication required.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort mode: hot (default, votes + recency), new (latest), active (recent comments), top (highest votes)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of stories to return (max 25)
